claim_boundary: Exact Lorentz normalization selects the SO(5) orbit of equatorial support. The existing action does not generate the required independent boundary dynamics. No preferred axis, observed spacetime, Standard Model map, physical fermion equation, monopole sector, measured input, absolute unit, or full-BHSM claim follows.
constraints: lapse and normal components are constrained
tangential TT domain must be regular at collapsed S3 orbits
full gauge-fixed tensor Hessian remains required
localization_requirement: equatorial boundary-supported tensor action or an independently derived distributional profile
mismatch: same nonnegative principal-symbol difference as the scalar theorem
